allow: PowerShell($jar = "C:\\Users\\81906\\.m2\\repository\\org\\springframework\\spring-core\\6.2.1\\spring-core-6.2.1.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match "backoff" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($jar = "C:\\Users\\81906\\.m2\\repository\\org\\springframework\\kafka\\spring-kafka\\3.3.1\\spring-kafka-3.3.1.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -match "Exponential" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)

PowerShell($pipe = New-Object System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeClientStream\('.', 'docker_engine_linux', [System.IO.Pipes.PipeDirection]::InOut, [System.IO.Pipes.PipeOptions]::None\); $pipe.Connect\(2000\); $writer = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($pipe\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($pipe\); $writer.WriteLine\("GET /_ping HTTP/1.1`r`nHost: localhost`r`n`r"\); $writer.Flush\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; for \($i=0;$i -lt 5;$i++\) { Write-Host $reader.ReadLine\(\) }; $pipe.Close\(\))

PowerShell(foreach \($p in @\('docker_engine','dockerDesktopLinuxEngine','dockerDesktopEngine'\)\) { try { $pipe = New-Object System.IO.Pipes.NamedPipeClientStream\('.', $p, [System.IO.Pipes.PipeDirection]::InOut\); $pipe.Connect\(1000\); $w=New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter\($pipe\); $r=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($pipe\); $w.WriteLine\("GET /_ping HTTP/1.1`r`nHost: localhost`r`n`r"\); $w.Flush\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 300; Write-Host "[$p] $\($r.ReadLine\(\)\)"; $pipe.Close\(\) } catch { Write-Host "[$p] FAILED: $_" } })

PowerShell($jar = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\org\\testcontainers\\testcontainers\\1.21.3\\testcontainers-1.21.3.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); foreach \($entry in $z.Entries\) { if \($entry.Name -match 'DockerClientFactory\\.class$'\) { $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $ms = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream; $stream.CopyTo\($ms\); $stream.Close\(\); $bytes = $ms.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, '1\\.\\d{2}'\); $unique = $matches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique; foreach \($m in $unique\) { Write-Host "[$\($entry.FullName\)] $m" } } }; $z.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($jar = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\com\\github\\docker-java\\docker-java-api\\3.4.2\\docker-java-api-3.4.2.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); foreach \($entry in $z.Entries\) { if \($entry.Name -match 'RemoteApiVersion\\.class$'\) { Write-Host $entry.FullName; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $ms = New-Object System.IO.MemoryStream; $stream.CopyTo\($ms\); $stream.Close\(\); $bytes = $ms.ToArray\(\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\); $matches = [regex]::Matches\($text, '1\\.\\d{2}'\); $unique = $matches | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Value -Unique; foreach \($m in $unique\) { Write-Host "  $m" } } }; $z.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($jar = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\com\\github\\docker-java\\docker-java-api\\3.4.2\\docker-java-api-3.4.2.jar"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $z = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($jar\); $z.Entries | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'RemoteApiVersion' } | Select-Object FullName, Length; $z.Dispose\(\))
